summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned. Open PRs are kept for their normal review/proof paths; already-closed PRs are skipped; security-sensitive linked/candidate refs are routed to central security handling.
